satya.remedy: କ୍ଲୋରୋଥାଲୋନିଲ ବା ମ୍ୟାଙ୍କୋଜେବ ଛତୁ ନାଶକ ପ୍ରୟୋଗ କରନ୍ତୁ। ଫସଲ ବଦଳ କରନ୍ତୁ। ପ୍ରମାଣୀତ ରୋଗ ମୁକ୍ତ ଆଳୁ ବ୍ୟବହାର କରନ୍ତୁ।
Apply chlorothalonil or mancozeb fungicides. Rotate crops. Use certified disease-free seed tubers. Ensure proper plant nutrition. Remove infected leaves promptly.
ତମ୍ବା ଆଧାରିତ ଜୀବାଣୁ ନାଶକ ଏବଂ ମ୍ୟାଙ୍କୋଜେବ ବ୍ୟବହାର କରନ୍ତୁ। ରୋଗ ମୁକ୍ତ ବିହନ ଲଗାନ୍ତୁ। ଉପର ଦିଗ ଜଳ ସେଚନ ଏଡ଼ାନ୍ତୁ। ଫସଲ ବଦଳ ଅଭ୍ୟାସ କରନ୍ତୁ।
Apply copper-based bactericides and mancozeb. Use disease-free seeds. Avoid overhead irrigation. Practice crop rotation with non-solanaceous crops. Remove and destroy infected plants.
Apply copper-based bactericides and mancozeb. Use disease-free seeds. Avoid overhead irrigation. Practice crop rotation with non-solanaceous crops. Remove and destroy infected plants.

sohan.remedy: ସଂକ୍ରମିତ ତଳ ପତ୍ର ଅପସାରଣ ଓ ନଷ୍ଟ କରନ୍ତୁ। ଛତୁ ନାଶକ ପ୍ରୟୋଗ କରନ୍ତୁ। ଅଧିକ ଜଳ ସେଚନ ଏଡ଼ାନ୍ତୁ।
Remove and destroy infected lower leaves. Apply fungicides (chlorothalonil, mancozeb). Mulch around plants. Ensure proper plant nutrition and avoid over-watering.
Remove and destroy infected lower leaves. Apply fungicides (chlorothalonil, mancozeb). Mulch around plants. Ensure proper plant nutrition and avoid over-watering.
Apply fungicides (chlorothalonil, mancozeb, copper). Remove infected lower leaves. Avoid overhead irrigation. Mulch to prevent soil splash. Practice crop rotation.
Remove and destroy infected lower leaves. Apply fungicides (chlorothalonil, mancozeb). Mulch around plants. Ensure proper plant nutrition and avoid over-watering.

Apply copper-based bactericides and mancozeb. Use disease-free seeds. Avoid overhead irrigation. Practice crop rotation with non-solanaceous crops. Remove and destroy infected plants.
